nodes.title: Process RPC Message
nodes.description: When pi-session sends RPC message. Parses message type (ExecuteTool, GitOperation, AgentAction). Converts to Grove action. Returns vector of actions to process.

nodes.title: Forward To PI
nodes.description: When Grove action affects pi-agent. Converts Grove action to RPC message. Sends to pi-session. Returns {forwarded: true}.

nodes.title: Add PI Agent
nodes.description: POST /api/pi/agent with {agentId, name, branch, worktreePath}. Registers new pi-agent with session manager. Returns {registered: true}.

nodes.title: Remove PI Agent
nodes.description: DELETE /api/pi/agent/:agentId. Unregisters pi-agent from session manager. Returns {removed: true}.

nodes.title: Convert Action To RPC
nodes.description: When forwarding Grove action. Converts Action enum to RpcMessage enum. Handles Action types: RefreshSelected, ToggleDiffView, OpenInEditor, etc.

nodes.title: Convert RPC To Action
nodes.description: When processing incoming RPC. Converts RpcMessage to Action enum. Handles message types: ExecuteTool, GitOperation, RequestSnapshot.

nodes.title: Get Snapshot
nodes.description: GET /api/pi/snapshot/:agentId. Returns {name, branch, worktreePath, status, outputBuffer, tmuxSession}. Used for state synchronization with pi-session.

nodes.title: Execute Tool
nodes.description: When pi-session sends ExecuteTool RPC. Maps tool name to Grove action. Tools: git status, git diff, editor, file_ops, terminal, debug. Returns {executed: true}.
